name: Southern Levant Campaign Map

godot_projection.notes: Projection is for prototype rendering only. Source coordinates remain WGS84.

source_notes: Physical coastline, rivers, and water bodies are simplified for a strategy-map scale from public/open modern geography references: Natural Earth, OpenStreetMap, and modern gazetteer coordinates.
Relief abstraction follows the major physiographic divisions of the southern Levant and is informed by SRTM-style elevation bands rather than raw elevation rasters.

Iron Age influence zones are historically annotated approximations kept for future overlays. The current Godot campaign map does not render them; settlement ownership is shown by owner_faction colors instead.
Ancient settlement identifications vary by site. Confidence fields record whether a location is secure, conventional, or tentative.
license_notes: This hand-authored prototype dataset is intended for reuse in this project.
If replacing simplified geometry with OpenStreetMap-derived features, preserve ODbL attribution and share-alike obligations.
Natural Earth data is public domain; NASA SRTM is a public scientific dataset but should be credited when directly used.
